# link11waap_backend_services (Data Source)

Lists all backend services in a configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Example: Backend Services Data Source

data "link11waap_config" "main" {}

# List all backend services
data "link11waap_backend_services" "all" {
  config_id = data.link11waap_config.main.id
}

output "backend_services" {
  value = data.link11waap_backend_services.all.backend_services
}

# Get a specific backend service by ID
data "link11waap_backend_services" "by_id" {
  config_id = data.link11waap_config.main.id
  id        = "my-backend-service-id"
}

output "backend_service_name" {
  value = data.link11waap_backend_services.by_id.backend_services[0].name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `config_id` (String) Configuration ID.

### Optional

- `id` (String) Backend Service ID. If specified, only the backend service with this ID will be returned.
- `name` (String) Backend Service Name. If specified, only the backend service with this name will be returned.

### Read-Only

- `backend_services` (Attributes List) List of backend services. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--backend_services))

<a id="nestedatt--backend_services"></a>
### Nested Schema for `backend_services`

Read-Only:

- `back_hosts` (Attributes Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--backend_services--back_hosts))
- `description` (String)
- `http11` (Boolean)
- `id` (String)
- `least_conn` (Boolean)
- `mtls_certificate` (String)
- `mtls_trusted_certificate` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `sticky` (String)
- `sticky_cookie_name` (String)
- `transport_mode` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--backend_services--back_hosts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `backend_services.back_hosts`

Read-Only:

- `backup` (Boolean)
- `down` (Boolean)
- `fail_timeout` (Number)
- `host` (String)
- `http_ports` (List of Number)
- `https_ports` (List of Number)
- `max_fails` (Number)
- `monitor_state` (String)
- `weight` (Number)
